info.name: Microsoft Azure StorageActionsManagementClient
info.description: The Azure Storage Actions Management API.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Storageactions Operations

request.description: Lists all of the available Storage Actions Rest API operations.

response.name: OK. The request has succeeded.
Error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storageactions Storagetasks Storagetaskname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage task within the specified resource group. Storage task names must be between 3 and 18 characters in length and use numbers and lower-case letters only.

request.description: Asynchronously creates a new storage task resource with the specified parameters. If a storage task is already created and a subsequent create request is issued with different properties, the storage task properties will be updated. If a storage task is already created and a subsequent create or update request is issued with the exact same set of properties, the request will succeed.

response.name: OK -- Update storage task with the same properties specified in the request body.
response.body: null

response.name: OK -- Create storage task with the same properties specified in the request body.
response.body: null

response.name: Accepted -- Create or update request accepted; operation will complete asynchronously.
Error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Storageactions Storagetasks Storagetaskname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the storage task within the specified resource group. Storage task names must be between 3 and 18 characters in length and use numbers and lower-case letters only.

response.name: Accepted -- Delete request accepted; operation will complete asynchronously.
NoContent -- specified storage task does not exist.
Error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Storageactions Locations Location Previewactions
